headline: Dr. Shiv Rao, Abridge CEO: A Fortt Knox Update
summary: Abridge CEO Dr. Shiv Rao told Jon Fortt the clinical-AI startup is launching its Clinician Intelligence Platform alongside an Nvidia partnership, escalating a major competitive shift. Rao said the platform turns the clinician-patient conversation into computable workflows that help before, during, and after the visit — and pointed to evaluations as the operating system for any vertical AI company aiming to own a regulated domain.
